case_title: PENCO INDUSTRIES, INC., A CORP. VS. ERICK GUIGUI et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENCO INDUSTRIES, INC., A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT GUIGUI, ERICK IND/DBA CANDLEMAN OF STONESTOWN GALLERIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-05-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-2002
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-05-2002 CONTINUED TO APR-26-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR TRIAL SETTING OBJECTION HEARING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 AT 9:20 AM IN DEPT. 624, ANNE E. BOULIANE. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT 1 RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF COUNSEL MAHONEY BY MAIL PER TELEPHONE CALL.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO OBJECTION TO TRIAL SETTING.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENCO INDUSTRIES, INC., A CORP. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2002 9:20 AM FOR DEPT 624

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 IN DEPT. 624 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF COUNSEL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROVE-UP HEARING WAS HELD. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE DECLARATION ORDERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF PENCO INDUSTRIES, INC. AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ERICK GUIGUI, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA CANLEMAN OF STONESTOWN GALLERIA IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,434.07, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $146.00 COSTS, AND INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% FROM SEPT. 29, 2000. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. JUDGE BOULIANE; CLERK. V. MU; REPORTER: D. LUBIN #3234 (624)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENCO INDUSTRIES, INC., A CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUIGUI, ERICK IND/DBA CANDLEMAN OF STONESTOWN GALLERIA $3,434.07 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $654.83 INTEREST, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,884.90, SEE SCANNED DOC

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-26-2002 A T 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
